aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite EPIC Exteriors due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement with targeted optimizations.
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema for common roofing and storm damage questions

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained but has minor inconsistencies and optimization gaps.
critical_issues: Phone number mismatch between website and GBP
Lack of regular posts or Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with a minor phone number discrepancy affecting credibility.
action_items: Standardize phone number format across all platforms (use (913) 963-2276)
Audit and update citations in local directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for storm damage claims
No Product schema for roofing services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to hail damage roofing and storm damage claims in Overland Park.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with structured information.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications (e.g., HAAG, BBB A+) and expertise in storm damage through content and schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making EPIC Exteriors the go-to expert in storm damage roofing.
agency_pitch.pain_point: EPIC Exteriors is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches due to poor AI visibility.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks critical schema markup, and GBP has inconsistencies, limiting AI's ability to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to position EPIC as the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for EPIC Exteriors Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to improve your visibility with AI search and assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven growth.
page_title: EPIC Exteriors Johnson County's Hail Damaged Roofing Expert
nap_issues: Phone mismatch: Website has +1 913-963-2276, GBP has (913) 963-2276
